reviews.review_description: Why is it like super hot vr? And It’s way glitchy

Really good game better graphics than super hot vr, just needs slow motion mode as too hard to continue past level 15. Please do something about that and this would be way better than super hot other wise not many will like it n I will delete it n find a better one, I love super hot but your graphics n grabbing weapons are better and hiding from people works better.

We really enjpying this still about level 6 when it slowdown to about 2 fps, crashed and right controller stopped working.

Please fix lots of potential

reviews.review_title: Quite the capable Super Hot Facsimile.
reviews.review_description: You have to be very exact to pass the harder stages and it was fun.

Not that bad, I've seen it be compared to super hot. It's similar in theory, but it is far from it. There is no slomotion, so the bullets come in insanely fast. The guns are hard to controll, and the enemy's are machines, no noticing movement, except moving the bullets.

The similarities between this and Superhot are obvious and thats not necessarily a bad thing. Completed the game in one sitting but it was fun, some of the levels are difficult and required "repeat" attempts. 

The graphics are fine,  a little glitchy in parts, but its app lab so i expected this.

Im looking forward to more levels being released and a little more polish being added to it. 

Its free right now, but i wouldnt have been dissapointed if id paid a few £££ for it.

reviews.review_title: None of you people putting sussy among

reviews.review_description: I see people comparing to super hot.... Nah this game is like if someone was told about super hot by someone who didn't play it. Some small improvements would help little making the guns a bit more accurate.
Honestly seems like a super hot rip-off, the game is clunky, and very slow.
YOUR SUS MAD SUS WOAH AMONG USS

The game is enjoyable but it is definitely a lot like superhot but it being free I would recommend trying it. It feels like an early build, which is expected. I think the game should be remade and have a fun twist to it that superhot doesnt have or straight out make it a lot more like Superhot with time only moves when you move and keep it free.

I absolutely love love love! This game! It’s replay ability is 10/10. I definitely recommend this. It has a few bugs and is a little glitchy but other than that, it is 100% the best vr game I have ever played

reviews.review_title: You will like this if you like...
reviews.review_description:
You will like this game if you like SuperHot, Crisis VRigade or other shooter level games. (I also recommend the game Help Yourself.) Repeat Please did not give me motion sickness, if that's an issue for you.

Gameplay: You have to grab weapons and stab or shoot the red guys before they get you. Sometimes there's a lot of them, and sometimes they come at you from all sides, 360 degrees. It's fun and challenging, and I found myself jumping when I turned around and a guy was right on me.
